korttiApp.title: KorttiApp
korttiApp.description: A digital wallet for work cards. Capture, store, and share your work certification cards easily and securely.

companyAbout.title: About Us
companyAbout.description: Multi-Apps Oy is a Finnish company focused on mobile app development. We believe a great app is simple, fast, and respects your privacy. All our apps are designed to work without accounts or cloud services — your data always stays with you.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your data stays on your device. No cloud, no data collection.

companyCta.title: Interested?
companyCta.subtitle: Get in touch and we'll tell you more about our products.

form.title: Send a Message
form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

hero.headline: All your work cards in one place
hero.subheadline: Photograph your physical card, save it in a digital wallet, and show it whenever you need — fast and easy.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: KorttiApp offers comprehensive features for managing your work cards.

wallet.title: Digital Wallet
wallet.description: Browse your cards in a beautiful wallet view. Tap a card to view it full screen.

capture.title: Smart Capture
capture.description: Photograph a card with the camera or import from gallery. The app detects card edges and crops automatically.

expiration.title: Expiration Tracking
expiration.description: See at a glance which cards are valid, expiring soon, or already expired.

pdf.title: PDF Sharing
pdf.description: Generate a professional PDF from selected cards and share via email, messaging, or any other method.

darkMode.title: Dark & Light Theme
darkMode.description: The app supports both dark and light themes on both platforms.

share.title: Easy Sharing
share.description: Share a single card image directly via the system share sheet.

cardTypes.title: Supported Card Types
cardTypes.subtitle: KorttiApp supports all common work certification cards — and much more.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Digitizing your cards is quick and easy.

capture.title: Capture Your Card
capture.description: Take a photo with the camera or import from gallery. The app automatically detects and crops the card.

browse.title: Browse Your Wallet
browse.description: All your cards are easy to browse in a beautiful wallet view. See expiration status at a glance.

share.title: Show & Share
share.description: Show your card full screen or generate a PDF for sharing multiple cards.

cta.title: Download KorttiApp for Free
cta.subtitle: Start digitizing your cards today. Available for iOS and Android.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.subtitle: Everything you need for managing your work cards — in one app.

walletView.title: Wallet View
walletView.description: Your cards are displayed in a beautiful stacked wallet view. Tap a card to expand it full screen.

smartCapture.title: Smart Capture
smartCapture.description: Photograph a card with the camera or import from gallery. Automatic edge detection and perspective correction.

ocrAutoFill.title: OCR Auto-fill
ocrAutoFill.description: The app automatically reads the card name and expiration date from the photo.

expirationTracking.title: Expiration Tracking
expirationTracking.description: Color-coded expiration status: green (valid), orange (expiring soon), and red (expired).

pdfSharing.title: PDF Sharing
pdfSharing.description: Generate a professional multi-page PDF from selected cards. Share via email, messaging, or any other method.

imageSharing.title: Image Sharing
imageSharing.description: Share a single card image directly via the system share sheet.

pdfImport.title: PDF Import
pdfImport.description: Import cards directly from PDF files.

reordering.title: Reordering
reordering.description: Long-press and drag cards into your preferred order. Order is saved automatically.

orientations.title: Orientations
orientations.description: Also store orientation documents and certificates in A4 format.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: All data stays on your device. No cloud, no accounts, no data collection.

plan.name: Free
plan.description: All features for free, without ads.

intro.title: 1. General
intro.content: Multi-Apps Oy respects the privacy of its users. This privacy policy describes how our apps handle data.

dataCollection.title: 2. Data Collection
dataCollection.content: Our apps do not collect, transmit, or store any user data on servers. All data — including images, names, and other information — is stored only on the user's device.

localStorage.title: 3. Local Storage
localStorage.content: All data is stored in the device's sandboxed app storage. Data is not synced to the cloud or shared with third parties.

camera.title: 4. Camera and Photo Library
camera.content: Apps may request access to the camera and photo library. Images are used only for in-app functionality.

sharing.title: 5. Sharing
sharing.content: When a user shares data, it is sent through the sharing channel chosen by the user. Our apps do not send data anywhere on their own.

analytics.title: 6. Analytics and Advertising
analytics.content: Our apps do not include analytics tracking, advertising systems, or third-party SDKs that collect data.

children.title: 7. Children
children.content: Our apps are not directed at children and do not collect data from children.

changes.title: 8. Changes
changes.content: This privacy policy may be updated as needed. Changes will be communicated through app updates.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using Multi-Apps Oy applications, you accept these terms of service. If you do not accept the terms, do not use the applications.

description.title: 2. Service Description
description.content: Multi-Apps Oy develops mobile applications that work locally on the user's device. The apps do not require an internet connection for basic functions.

usage.title: 3. License
usage.content: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the applications for personal and professional purposes.

userResponsibility.title: 4. User Responsibilities
userResponsibility.content: You are responsible for the data you store in the applications. Multi-Apps Oy is not responsible for the accuracy or suitability of data for official purposes.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: Multi-Apps Oy applications and their content are protected by copyright. The applications may not be copied, modified, or distributed without permission.

disclaimer.title: 6. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The applications are provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for any damages or data loss that may result from using the applications.

dataHandling.title: 7. Data Handling
dataHandling.content: All data is stored locally on your device. We do not use servers and do not collect your data. See the privacy policy for more details.

appStore.title: 8. App Store Terms
appStore.content: Downloading and using the applications occurs through the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, and their respective terms of service apply.

modifications.title: 9. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Changes take effect when published with an app update.

law.title: 10. Governing Law
law.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Finland. Any disputes shall be resolved in Finnish courts.

general.title: 1. General
general.content: Multi-Apps Oy respects the privacy of its users. This privacy policy describes how our applications handle data.

dataCollection.title: 3. Data Collection
dataCollection.content: Our applications do not collect, transmit, or store user data on our own servers, except for the license functionality described in section 6. All other data — including images, names, and other information — is stored only on the user's device.

localStorage.title: 4. Local Storage
localStorage.content: All data is stored in the device's sandboxed app storage. Data is not synced to the cloud or shared with third parties. When the user uninstalls the application, all data stored by the application is permanently removed from the device.

externalApis.title: 5. External APIs
externalApis.content1: To function, the applications retrieve data from third-party open APIs. The applications do not send any personal data to these services. However, it is possible that the servers of these services may log the user's IP address or other technical data as part of normal server logging. Multi-Apps Oy does not control these servers and cannot influence their logging practices.
externalApis.content2: To retrieve road address data, the location selected by the user on the map or the device's GNSS location is sent to a third-party server. Location data is used solely for determining the road address and is not stored by Multi-Apps Oy.

licenseCode.title: 6. License Code
licenseCode.content: When the user activates a license code, an anonymized device identifier is stored in Multi-Apps Oy's database for the duration of the license validity. This identifier is used solely for verifying license validity. The identifier is anonymized and cannot be linked to the user's identity. The identifier is automatically removed from the database when the license expires.

camera.title: 7. Camera and Photo Library
camera.content: Applications may request access to the camera and photo library. These permissions are used only for adding user-selected images to the application. Images are not sent to servers or processed outside the application. The user can revoke these permissions at any time through device settings.

sharing.title: 8. Sharing
sharing.content: The user can share content created in the application (such as images or data) through the device's built-in sharing functionality. In this case, data is sent through the sharing channel chosen by the user. Our applications do not send data anywhere on their own.

analytics.title: 9. Analytics and Advertising
analytics.content: Our applications do not include analytics tracking, advertising systems, or third-party SDKs that collect data.

security.title: 10. Data Security
security.content: Since data is stored only on the user's device in the application's own protected storage, data security relies on the device's own security mechanisms. We recommend that users keep their device's operating system up to date.

children.title: 11. Children
children.content: Our applications are not specifically directed at children and do not collect data from children.

gdpr.title: 12. User Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.content: We comply with the EU General Data Protection Regulation. Since data is stored only on your device, you have full control over your data. You can:

inspect.label: Access your data:
inspect.content: You can see all data directly in the application.

delete.label: Delete your data:
delete.content: All data is removed when you uninstall the application from your device.

consent.label: Withdraw consent:
consent.content: You can change camera and gallery permissions in your device settings at any time.

changes.title: 13. Changes
changes.content: This privacy policy may be updated as needed. Changes will be communicated through app updates.

contact.title: 14. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have questions about privacy, you can contact us:

general.title: 1. General
general.content: These terms of service ("Terms") apply to the RoadPoint mobile application ("Application") provided by MultiApps ("we", "our"). By using the Application, you accept these Terms in their entirety. If you do not accept these Terms, do not use the Application.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.content: RoadPoint is a map application that displays road address information for Finland's road network. The Application retrieves data based on the user's location or map tap and displays metadata for the road point, such as road number, road section, distance, municipality, and road class.

internet.title: 2.1 Internet Connection
internet.content: The Application requires a continuous internet connection to function. The Application retrieves map and road address data from external APIs in real time, and the Application does not work without a network connection. We are not responsible for the availability or quality of the internet connection.

location.title: 2.2 Location Services
location.content: Some Application features, such as automatic road address lookup based on the user's location, require precise GNSS positioning (GPS). The accuracy of location data depends on the user's device, environmental conditions, and satellite availability. We are not responsible for positioning accuracy or resulting inaccuracies in road address data.

availability.title: 2.3 Geographic Availability
availability.content1: The service is designed for use in Finland, and its functionality elsewhere is not guaranteed.

version.title: 2.4 Application Version
version.content: The Application may require the latest version to function properly. We do not guarantee the functionality or compatibility of older versions, and their support may be discontinued at any time without separate notice.

plan.title: 3.1 Subscription
plan.content: Using the Application requires an active subscription. The subscription is a monthly subscription that renews automatically at the end of each billing period.

trial.title: 3.2 Free Trial
trial.content: New subscribers may receive a free trial period. The trial period length is stated at the time of subscription. If the subscription is not cancelled before the trial period ends, the subscription becomes paid.

payment.title: 3.3 Payments and Billing
payment.content: Subscription fees are charged through the Apple App Store or Google Play Store using the payment method selected by the user. Prices may vary by region and include applicable taxes.

cancellation.title: 3.4 Cancellation
cancellation.content: The subscription can be cancelled at any time through device settings or the app store's subscription management. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Any refunds are handled in accordance with the app store's terms.

license.title: 3.5 License Codes
license.content: The Application can also be used with a separate license code. License codes have a device-specific limitation. A license code entitles the user to use the Application according to the license code terms.

thirdParty.title: 4.1 Third-Party APIs
thirdParty.content: The Application uses external third-party APIs and services for retrieving and displaying data, including but not limited to:
thirdParty.item1: Finnish Transport Infrastructure Agency's Viitekehysmuunnin API for road address data retrieval

disclaimer.title: 4.2 Disclaimer for External Services
disclaimer.content1: We do not own, control, or maintain the aforementioned external APIs and services. We cannot guarantee the continuous availability, functionality, accuracy, or error-free operation of these services. External services may experience outages, delays, or errors without prior notice, and this is beyond our control.
disclaimer.content2: We are not liable for any damages or harm arising from the malfunction, availability issues, data inaccuracies, or other disruptions of external APIs or services.
disclaimer.content3: External service providers may change their API terms, content, or availability without separate notice, which may affect the Application's functionality.
disclaimer.content4: External APIs may impose rate limits. If an exceptionally large number of queries are made through the Application, the third-party API may temporarily limit or block data retrieval. In such situations, the Application's functionality may be limited, and this does not entitle the user to a refund or compensation.

accuracy.title: 5. Data Accuracy
accuracy.content: The road address data and other information displayed by the Application are based on data obtained from external sources. We do not guarantee the correctness, timeliness, or completeness of the data. The Application does not replace official data sources and should not be used as the sole source of information in decisions where data accuracy is of essential importance.

userObligations.title: 6. User Obligations
userObligations.item1: Use the Application in accordance with these Terms and applicable legislation
userObligations.item2: Not attempt to circumvent the Application's technical protections or limitations
userObligations.item3: Not use the Application in a manner that places unreasonable load on the services
userObligations.item4: Not share license codes with third parties

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The Application is provided "as is" without any warranty. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use the Application, including but not limited to:
liability.item1: Damages arising from data inaccuracies or incompleteness
liability.item3: Damages arising from external API malfunctions

suspension.title: 8. Service Suspension and Termination
suspension.content1: We reserve the right to suspend, limit, or terminate the Application's operation in whole or in part at any time, without prior notice and for any reason. This also applies to situations where external services cease to function or their terms change.
suspension.content2: If the Application's operation is permanently terminated, we will endeavor to notify users within a reasonable time in advance. We are not obligated to compensate users for damages arising from service suspension or termination. Users have the right to cancel their subscription through the app store.
suspension.content3: If the service is terminated during an active subscription period, any refunds are determined in accordance with the app store's terms.

ip.title: 9. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Application and its content, including but not limited to source code, graphics, user interface, and documentation, are the property of MultiApps and protected under copyright law. A subscription or license code grants the user a limited, personal, and non-transferable right to use the Application.

privacy.title: 10. Privacy
privacy.contentBefore: The processing of personal data related to the use of the Application is described in more detail in our
privacy.contentAfter: . By using the Application, you accept the processing of data in accordance with the privacy policy.

forceMajeure.title: 11. Force Majeure
forceMajeure.content: We are not liable for delays or failure to fulfill our obligations if caused by force majeure. Force majeure is considered an event beyond our control that we could not have reasonably foreseen, including but not limited to:
forceMajeure.item1: Natural disasters, wars, or acts of terrorism
forceMajeure.item2: Legislative changes, government orders, or sanctions
forceMajeure.item3: Telecommunications disruptions, cyberattacks, or internet outages
forceMajeure.item4: Third-party API or service malfunctions or discontinuations
forceMajeure.item5: Pandemics, epidemics, or other similar emergencies
forceMajeure.closing: In a force majeure situation, we will endeavor to inform users of the obstacle and its estimated duration within a reasonable time.

modifications.title: 12. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms. Users will be notified of material changes through the Application or by email. Continued use of the Application after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

law.title: 13. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
law.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Finland. Any disputes shall be resolved primarily through negotiation. If negotiations do not result in a settlement, the dispute shall be resolved in the Helsinki District Court.

contact.title: 14. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have questions about these Terms or the use of the Application, please contact:
